nasb.text: to fulfill the word which He spoke, “Of those whom You have given Me I lost not one.”

esv.text: This was to fulfill the word that he had spoken: “Of those whom you gave me I have lost not one.”

cnv.text: 這應驗了耶穌說過的話：“你賜給我的人，我一個也沒有失落。”

ccb.text: 这是要应验祂以前说的：“你赐给我的人一个也没有失掉。”

csbs.text: 这是为要应验耶稣说过的话：“你所赐给我的人，我一个也没有丢失。”
